title: Handwriting & Transcription
objective: Students will explore handwriting & transcription concepts including Joining Letters.

steps.content: Today we're going to learn about Joining Letters. Get ready for an adventure!
Begin to join letters using diagonal and horizontal strokes, understanding which letter pairs are best left unjoined, forming letters of correct size relative to one another
Let's practice together! Join 'in', 'un', 'it' with a diagonal stroke connecting the letters
Is you starting to join up their letters when writing, so that their handwriting flows more smoothly rather than each letter standing completely separate?

You did it! Here's what we explored about Joining Letters: Join 'in', 'un', 'it' with a diagonal stroke connecting the letters Leave letters like 'b' unjoined when followed by certain letters, explaining why
